title: A Strange Kingdom in Elbaf
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Marines, Unknown person #11, World Government, Unknown person #12 as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zena Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha! At least morale is on the rise!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's somethin' we gotta take advantage of!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Now, Lemme hear it, Kuzan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Koby got away... Baught?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WELL, WE CAUGHT GARP:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zena ha ha ha! Now that's what I call a consolation prize!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You keep finding a way to trade up, Cap'n', nyah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: to be honest...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I was going for the kill...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But he survived.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be hard on herself, Kuzan. There ain't many who can take him down, y'know?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well... it was a team effort...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like the winds of fortune are favorite us!! Weeha ha ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We also snagged this three-eyed girly here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey!! Get Lafitte on the line!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Navy "UMIT SHIPPING"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Click

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes, commodore teach?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What're those revolutionaries up to?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Seems like their siege is proving effective...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the Red Port's Bondolas keep breaking down...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...whenever they try to load them with food.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All supply shipments from foreign nations have been halted, too.

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: Mary Geoise

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: navy ho

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even when the Navy manages to secure food, they can't stop the sabotaged Bondolas from crashing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The celestial dragons may really start to starve at this rate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's all quite unprecedented, really! Not to mention engaging!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zena ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...Get ready!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hehe... Under- stood!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: pirate Island-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: PIZARRO, WE'VE ARRIVED!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Nyaah! It's Devon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Pick us up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Docking you guys is always such a pain, nyah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You KN-EOW I'M INJURED, RIGHT?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: oh... hell nah!!! It's a Monster!!! Don't Take Me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Big bro!! Big Sis!! Save me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Quit Jabberin'!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You brought that guy, didn'tcha?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Uh- huh.

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
